# Regression: a filename that contains ".." (e.g. "s.a.r..geojson") is not path
# traversal and must be addable. The path guard rejects only a real ".." path
# segment, not the substring inside a name.

exec git init
exec git config user.email test@sesam.dev
exec git config user.name 'Sesam Test'

exec sesam init --user admin
exec git add -A
exec git commit -m 'init sesam'

exec sesam add geo/countries/hong_kong_s.a.r..geojson --group dev
exec sesam ls
stdout 'hong_kong_s.a.r..geojson'
exists .sesam/objects/geo/countries/hong_kong_s.a.r..geojson.sesam
exec sesam verify

-- geo/countries/hong_kong_s.a.r..geojson --
{"type":"boundary"}
